overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game (Cyberpunk 2077), walking through a neon-lit urban plaza beneath a massive billboard, ascending stairs past a distinctive trash pile with a skull sculpture, and exploring an upper-level commercial walkway with food stalls and glowing advertisements.

events.description: turning right toward the concrete stairway leading to upper level

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza toward the central kiosk structure and the stairway on the right

large industrial yellow structural support beam on the left side
large industrial yellow structural support beam on the right side
elevated platform structure with green smoke or vapor rising from it
wide concrete stairway leading up to the upper commercial level

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide urban plaza beneath a massive Kiroshi billboard, illuminated by green neon lights and industrial lighting. The camera moves forward through the open space, passing metal barriers and approaching a central structure emitting green smoke, while scattered pedestrians walk through the area. The scene is dominated by large yellow industrial support beams and ends with a turn toward a concrete stairway on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway with large trash pile featuring white skull sculpture

events.description: turning right and entering the stairway area from the open plaza
ascending the stairs toward the upper commercial walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs, passing a distinctive trash pile with a skull sculpture on the left

notable_agents.action: person in green outfit sitting on a dumpster or container beside the stairs
person descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: large pile of garbage bags with a distinctive white skull or face sculpture embedded in the center
concrete safety railing at the top of the stairs marking the upper level

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into a narrower stairway area, leaving the open plaza behind. As it ascends the concrete stairs, it passes a striking trash pile containing a white skull sculpture on the left, where a person sits on a nearby dumpster. The lighting becomes darker and more enclosed until reaching the top where neon lights from the upper level become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level commercial walkway with neon advertisements and food stalls

events.description: reaching the top of stairs and entering the upper commercial walkway with bright neon signs
approaching a brightly lit food stall with warm interior lighting contrasting the cool neon

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper walkway past various commercial stalls and neon advertisements, approaching a food vendor at the end

notable_agents.action: food vendor working inside the stall, visible through the serving window at the end of the walkway

entered.detail: tall structure with multiple glowing advertisement screens displaying various images
large mechanical equipment with conveyor belt and yellow-black caution markings
open-front food stall with counter, stools, and cooking equipment inside

segments.scene_description: Having reached the upper level, the scene opens into a commercial walkway lined with neon advertisement towers and various stalls. The camera moves past industrial machinery on the right and approaches a food stall at the end of the path, where a vendor is visible working inside. The area is moderately crowded with pedestrians, and the lighting shifts from dark stairwell to vibrant neon and warm interior glow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vast, neon-lit urban plaza up into a vibrant, enclosed commercial walkway. It begins in a wide open space beneath a massive green Kiroshi billboard, moving past industrial support beams and green smoke toward a concrete stairway. As the camera turns and ascends the stairs, the environment becomes darker and more confined, passing a white skull sculpture nestled in a trash pile. The scene then opens onto an upper-level walkway where the lighting shifts from the dim stairwell to a glow of neon advertisement towers and warm interior lights. Finally, the camera glides past industrial machinery and pedestrians toward a food stall where a vendor works at the end of the path.
